title: Alchemy's AI Agents Can Now Make Visa Payments
summary: Alchemy's AgentCard service now lets AI agents powered by models like OpenAI or Anthropic make payments through the Visa network. This integration with Visa Intelligent Commerce could make AI-driven commerce more seamless for businesses and consumers.
body:
Alchemy, a leading blockchain infrastructure provider, has integrated its AI-driven identity and payment service, AgentCard, with Visa's Intelligent Commerce platform. This integration allows AI agents—built on models from any provider, including OpenAI or Anthropic—to make commercial transactions directly through the Visa network.

The AgentCard service enables AI agents to manage digital identities and execute payments autonomously. By connecting to Visa's network, these AI agents can now facilitate transactions for users, potentially streamlining e-commerce, subscription services, and other automated financial interactions. This move is part of a broader trend toward integrating AI with traditional financial infrastructure to enhance automation and convenience.

For everyday users, this development could mean more seamless and automated payment experiences. Imagine an AI assistant that can handle your subscriptions, bill payments, or even shopping without manual intervention. Businesses may also benefit from more efficient transaction processing and reduced fraud risks, as AI agents can verify identities and authorize payments in real time.

This integration highlights the growing synergy between AI and financial services. As AI agents become more capable, their ability to interact with traditional financial networks like Visa could redefine how we manage money. Users and businesses should watch for more AI-driven financial tools and services to emerge in the coming months. Read more → https://www.coindesk.com/business/2026/06/18/alchemy-s-ai-driven-identity-and-payment-service-gains-access-to-visa-network
twitterThread: AI agents can now make payments through Visa, thanks to Alchemy's AgentCard integration. No more manual transactions for subscriptions or bills!
Alchemy's AgentCard lets AI agents—powered by models like OpenAI or Anthropic—handle payments via Visa's network. This could automate everything from shopping to bill pay.

This is a big step toward seamless AI-driven finance. Watch for more automated payment tools in the near future. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-18-alchemys-ai-agents-can-now-make-visa-payments
standaloneTweet: AI agents can now make Visa payments automatically. Imagine your AI assistant handling subscriptions and bills for you—no manual work needed!
